titleStmt.title: SII 4.1334: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1334. (A.R. No. 412 of 1893). ON THE SAME TIER.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śakavarṣamulu 1028 svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpritvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara parama
bhaṭṭāraka ravikulatilaka cōḍakulaśēkhara pāṇḍyakulāṁtaka samastarājāśraya rājarājēṁdra vīramahēṁdra vikra
macōḍa vijayābharaṇa nijabhujavijitagaṁggākāvērīparyyaṁtagiridharitrīpati saptamōviṣṇuvardhanulaina tribhuva
nacakravartti śrīkulōttuṁggacōḍadēvara pravarddhamānavijayarājyasaṁvatsaraṁbulu 37 gu śrāhi dina 338
cōḍamaṇḍalamuna nityavinōdavalanāṁṭi vennakōṭamuna kūvanūri vēnūruḍayā vēlāgiriyāṇḍiyaina rā
jarājamanittarayaṁḍu śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvarakuṁ beṭṭina Akhaṇḍavartti lōhadaṇudiviya 1 ṇṭiki nācaṁdrā
rkkamu neyi sariyiṁpagalavārugā śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvara kilaramuna prolabōla nāvayayu kāṭabōyu
mayayu si dāmayayu cadukanā kommaya berasina nalvuru bōluṁ būṁṭagā Annabōla nūṁkani vasamu
na viḍcina Eḍlu 50 nityapaḍi golavaṁgala tribhuvanāṁkuśa nē māna 1 . likhitaṁ vīra rājēṁdracōḍa Ācaryyaḥ .
Digital edition of SII 4.1334 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
